# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

services:
  - name: api-service
    id: api-service-id
    plugins:
      - cors:
          headers: Accept,Content-Type
          methods: GET,HEAD
          origin: https://example.com
      - key-auth:
          key_names: api_key

routes:
  - hostname: example.com
    plugins:
      - cors:
          headers: Accept,Content-Type
          methods: POST,GET,OPTIONS
          origin: https://example1.com https://example2.com
      - rate-limiting:
        name: rate-limiter
        requests_per_minute: 100

globals:
  plugins:
    - cors:
        headers: Accept,Content-Type
        methods: PUT,DELETE,GET,HEAD,OPTIONS
        origin: *
    - key-auth:
      key_names: api_key
